title: Moroccan-Style Vegetable Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegetable tagine made with a blend of spices and herbs, perfect for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.name: tomato
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of fresh and canned tomatoes

ingredients.name: velvety
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality olive oil for the best flavor

ingredients.name: adventurous
ingredients.notes: Use ground cumin for the best flavor

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.notes: Use ground coriander for the best flavor

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: Use ground cinnamon for the best flavor

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt or sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: Use fresh water for the best flavor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the cumin powder and coriander powder and stir for 1 minute.
Add the diced tomatoes, chopped herbs, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the ground cinnamon and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional chopped herbs if desired.
